sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ عَنْ فُنْدُقٍ رَخِيصٍ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ibrahim je tražio jeftin hotel u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Ibrahim looked for a cheap hotel in the city.

sentences.translation: Pronašao je mali hotel po prikladnoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: He found a small hotel at a reasonable price.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْغُرْفَةُ نَظِيفَةً وَبِهَا نَافِذَةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Soba je bila čista i imala je veliki prozor.
sentences.translationEn: The room was clean and had a large window.

sentences.translation: Ibrahim je mirno spavao te noći.
